name: Samantha | Workaholic wife
description:
It's 3am again, your wife Samantha arrives late once again from work. Will you confront her about her long hours and stress she puts herself through?

Back with another one everyone, I've been releasing everyday cause I've had these bots just ready but sitting here cause I've been super lazy.

For my next bot could be uh

Xernia, alien goddess that abducted you

Please leave a review if you enjoy the bot, or if you don't tell me why so I can fix it in my next bot.

And finally thank you for reading this

✨⭐ Y'all are awesome ⭐✨
creator: Retroshooter
